description: Implement Motor Start Analysis, Harmonic Analysis & Filter, and VFD Sizing modules with full calculation engines, click-only trilingual UI, DS/HD 60364 compliance, and 45+ comprehensive tests.
steps: 1. Add module translations for 'motor', 'harmonic', 'vfd' to T.da.modules, T.en.modules, T.fa.modules
2. Add Farsi translations to _FA dictionary for all new module strings
3. Add case statements for 'motor', 'harmonic', 'vfd' in renderModule switch
4. Implement Motor Start Analysis module with IEC motor FLC table, starting current calculation, voltage dip, MPCB/contactor/relay selection from PRODUCTS
5. Implement Harmonic Analysis module with THD calculation, K-factor, filter sizing, neutral oversizing, EN 50160 compliance
6. Implement VFD Sizing module with application-based sizing, input/output cable selection, EMC category, braking resistor, no-RCD warning
7. Add 45+ tests to test-sld.js covering all three modules
acceptance_criteria: All existing 220 tests continue to pass
45+ new tests pass for motor, harmonic, and VFD modules
All render functions return HTML with no <input type='text'> or <textarea>
Motor module selects correct MPCB, contactor, and overload relay from PRODUCTS
Harmonic module calculates THD and K-factor correctly
VFD module warns against RCD on output
Conservative calculations throughout (ceiling for danger, floor for capacity)
verification: node /projects/sandbox/Claude/test-sld.js 2>&1 | grep 'Results:' should show 265+ passed, 0 failed
findings: All 267 tests pass (220 existing + 47 new). Motor module uses IEC FLC table for 20 standard motor sizes (0.55-110kW) with 4 pole configurations. Voltage dip uses cable impedance lookup based on FLC range. Harmonic module calculates THD with ceiling rounding (conservative). K-factor uses IEEE C57.110 formula. VFD module uses EMC category maxCable values for output cable length limits. Critical no-RCD warning prominently displayed with red styling.
